languages.text: "Позвольте присмотреться." {n}Эоганн подлетает к вам, нависая ощетинившейся манипуляторами громадой.{/n} "Хм... сочетанная политравма... возможно, кардиогенный шок... Истерические сумерки или онейроидный бред? Или же что-то и впрямь непостижимое? Ты прав, Нунциус, данных беглого осмотра явно недостаточно!"

"Let me take a closer look." {n}Eogunn floats over to you, his hulking form bristling with manipulators as he looms overhead.{/n} "Hmm... complex polytrauma... possibly cardiogenic shock... Hysterical twilight state or oneiroid delirium? Or something truly inconceivable? Quite right, Nuncius, a cursory examination is not enough!"
languages.original_text: "Позвольте присмотреться." {n}Эоганн подлетает к вам, нависая ощетинившейся манипуляторами громадой.{/n} "Хм... сочетанная политравма... возможно, кардиогенный шок... Истерические сумерки или онейроидный бред? Или же что-то и впрямь непостижимое? Ты прав, Нунциус, данных беглого осмотра явно недостаточно!"

Hysterical twilight state or oneiroid delirium? Or something truly inconceivable? Quite right, Nuncius, a cursory examination is not enough!"

Hysterical twilight state or oneiroid delirium? Or something truly inconceivable? Quite right, Nuncius, a cursory examination is not enough!"

"Let me take a closer look." {n}Eogunn floats over to you, his hulking form bristling with manipulators as he looms overhead.{/n} "Hmm... complex polytrauma... possibly cardiogenic shock... Hysterical twilight state or oneiroid delirium? Or something truly inconceivable? Quite right, Nuncius, a cursory examination is not enough!"

languages.text: «Déjeme echar un vistazo de cerca». {n}Eogunn se acerca flotando. Los manipuladores de su cuerpo se erizan al acercarse.{/n} «Mmm... politraumatismo complejo... posible conmoción cardiogénica... ¿Un estado crepuscular o un delirio oniroide? ¿O tal vez algo verdaderamente novedoso? Efectivamente, Nuncius, ¡necesitamos un análisis más exhaustivo!».
languages.original_text: "Let me take a closer look." {n}Eogunn floats over to you, his hulking form bristling with manipulators as he looms overhead.{/n} "Hmm... complex polytrauma... possibly cardiogenic shock... Hysterical twilight state or oneiroid delirium? Or something truly inconceivable? Quite right, Nuncius, a cursory examination is not enough!"

traits.locale_text: «Déjeme echar un vistazo de cerca». {n}Eogunn se acerca flotando. Los manipuladores de su cuerpo se erizan al acercarse.{/n} «Mmm... politraumatismo complejo... posible conmoción cardiogénica... ¿Un estado crepuscular o un delirio oniroide? ¿O tal vez algo verdaderamente novedoso? Efectivamente, Nuncius, ¡necesitamos un análisis más exhaustivo!».

languages.text: “让我仔细看看。”{n}伊奥贡飘到你跟前，那庞大的身影悬停在你的头顶，上面满是机械触须。{/n}“嗯……复杂的多重创伤……可能是心源性休克……癔症性朦胧状态？还是梦呓性谵妄？又或者是完全无法理解的病症？说得很对，努恩修斯，光靠浮皮潦草的检查可没法确定！”
languages.original_text: "Let me take a closer look." {n}Eogunn floats over to you, his hulking form bristling with manipulators as he looms overhead.{/n} "Hmm... complex polytrauma... possibly cardiogenic shock... Hysterical twilight state or oneiroid delirium? Or something truly inconceivable? Quite right, Nuncius, a cursory examination is not enough!"

traits.locale_text: “让我仔细看看。”{n}伊奥贡飘到你跟前，那庞大的身影悬停在你的头顶，上面满是机械触须。{/n}“嗯……复杂的多重创伤……可能是心源性休克……癔症性朦胧状态？还是梦呓性谵妄？又或者是完全无法理解的病症？说得很对，努恩修斯，光靠浮皮潦草的检查可没法确定！”

languages.text: « Laissez-moi regarder de plus près. » {n}Eogunn flotte vers vous, et sa silhouette imposante hérissée de manipulateurs vous surplombe.{/n} « Hmm... Polytraumatisme complexe... choc cardiogénique probable... État crépusculaire hystérique ou delirium oniroïde ? À moins qu'il s'agisse de quelque chose d'inconcevable ? C'est vrai, Nuncius, un examen sommaire ne suffit pas ! »
languages.original_text: "Let me take a closer look." {n}Eogunn floats over to you, his hulking form bristling with manipulators as he looms overhead.{/n} "Hmm... complex polytrauma... possibly cardiogenic shock... Hysterical twilight state or oneiroid delirium? Or something truly inconceivable? Quite right, Nuncius, a cursory examination is not enough!"

traits.locale_text: « Laissez-moi regarder de plus près. » {n}Eogunn flotte vers vous, et sa silhouette imposante hérissée de manipulateurs vous surplombe.{/n} « Hmm... Polytraumatisme complexe... choc cardiogénique probable... État crépusculaire hystérique ou delirium oniroïde ? À moins qu'il s'agisse de quelque chose d'inconcevable ? C'est vrai, Nuncius, un examen sommaire ne suffit pas ! »

languages.text: "Yakından bakayım." {n}Eogunn sana doğru süzülüyor, koca gövdesi başının üzerinde dikilirken çevirteçlerle dolup taşıyor.{/n} "Karmaşık politravma... Muhtemelen kardiyojenik şok... Histerik alacalanma hâli veya rüyaya benzer bir hezeyan mı ki? Yoksa gerçekten akıl almaz bir şey mi? Çok haklısın Nuncius, yüzeysel bir inceleme yeterli değil!"
languages.original_text: "Let me take a closer look." {n}Eogunn floats over to you, his hulking form bristling with manipulators as he looms overhead.{/n} "Hmm... complex polytrauma... possibly cardiogenic shock... Hysterical twilight state or oneiroid delirium? Or something truly inconceivable? Quite right, Nuncius, a cursory examination is not enough!"

traits.locale_text: "Yakından bakayım." {n}Eogunn sana doğru süzülüyor, koca gövdesi başının üzerinde dikilirken çevirteçlerle dolup taşıyor.{/n} "Karmaşık politravma... Muhtemelen kardiyojenik şok... Histerik alacalanma hâli veya rüyaya benzer bir hezeyan mı ki? Yoksa gerçekten akıl almaz bir şey mi? Çok haklısın Nuncius, yüzeysel bir inceleme yeterli değil!"

languages.text: 「もっと近くで見せてください」{n}エオガンがあなたの方へ浮かんでくる。その巨体はマニピュレーターを林立させ、頭上に覆いかぶさった。{/n}「ふむ……複雑な多発外傷……心原性ショックの可能性も……ヒステリー性朦朧状態か、それとも夢幻様せん妄？ あるいは、まこと想像も及ばぬ何かか？ まったくその通りです、ヌンキウス、ざっと診ただけでは不十分です！」
languages.original_text: "Let me take a closer look." {n}Eogunn floats over to you, his hulking form bristling with manipulators as he looms overhead.{/n} "Hmm... complex polytrauma... possibly cardiogenic shock... Hysterical twilight state or oneiroid delirium? Or something truly inconceivable? Quite right, Nuncius, a cursory examination is not enough!"

traits.locale_text: 「もっと近くで見せてください」{n}エオガンがあなたの方へ浮かんでくる。その巨体はマニピュレーターを林立させ、頭上に覆いかぶさった。{/n}「ふむ……複雑な多発外傷……心原性ショックの可能性も……ヒステリー性朦朧状態か、それとも夢幻様せん妄？ あるいは、まこと想像も及ばぬ何かか？ まったくその通りです、ヌンキウス、ざっと診ただけでは不十分です！」

languages.text: "Gestattet mir einen genaueren Blick." {n}Eogunn schwebt zu dir. Seine korpulente Gestalt ist mit Mechadendriten gespickt, als er sich vor dir aufbaut.{/n} "Hmm ... komplexes Polytrauma ... möglicherweise kardiogener Schock ... Hysterischer Dämmerzustand oder oneiroides Delirium? Oder etwas gänzlich Undenkbares? Wohl wahr, Nuncius, eine oberflächliche Untersuchung reicht nicht!"
languages.original_text: "Let me take a closer look." {n}Eogunn floats over to you, his hulking form bristling with manipulators as he looms overhead.{/n} "Hmm... complex polytrauma... possibly cardiogenic shock...
